name: Security + Rate Limiting
objective: Implement per-tenant rate limiting and row-level security on D1 database tables
description: Add security layer with per-tenant rate limits (requests/minute), row-level security policies on all D1 tables, and comprehensive audit logging for compliance.
success_criteria: Rate limits enforced at Cloudflare Workers edge
Row-level security prevents cross-tenant data access
Audit log captures all data access events
Security audit passes with no critical findings
